Mission.name: h_1-1_tas_arkbay_finalexam
Mission.Title: Final Exam
Mission.Description:
You've gone through the [$class] track in school, right? Then I'll use my ride, 'Ol Bertie here, for your trial. I need to see if you're worth the Company's investment. Ready? I'll get into 'Ol Bertie and we'll pull off over into the ruins there, then we'll se if you can [$imp]defeat me[$/imp]. Don't worry about doin' me any harm; I've got my INC contract in good standing, as do all of us working for Hestia out here.
[$imp]Meet me at the repair station behind me[$/imp] when we're through. I've got a present with your name on it!
Mission.NotCompleteText: [$imp]Defeat Gunny Sioux in the Bay 313 Trial Zone.[$/imp]
Mission.CompleteText:
Woo-wee [$name]! You did great out there! For your reward, I'm giving you this old front weapon. It's not much, but I'm sure you'll find better out on the highway.
[$inst]After you claim your reward, you can equip your new front weapon. Press[$/inst] [$key]Toggle Inventory[$/key] [$inst]to open up your inventory. Right-click on the weapon, and it will automatically mount onto the front of your vehicle. Unlike turrets, front weapons always point forward, so you must maneuver to get your enemy in front of you.[$/inst]
Next, I'll teach you how to repair your ride.

Objective.name: h_1-1_arkbay_finalexam_1
Objective.ExternalText: Defeat Gunny Sioux. Once this is done, go meet him at the repair station.
Objective.Title: Defeat Gunny Sioux
Objective.DefaultText: Defeat Gunny Sioux. Once this is done, go meet him at the repair station.

Objective.name: h_1-1_arkbay_finalexam_2
Objective.ExternalText: You have defeated Gunny Sioux! INC has taken him to the repair station. Meet him there.
Objective.Title: Meet Gunny Sioux at the repair station
Objective.DefaultText: You have defeated Gunny Sioux! INC has taken him to the repair station. Meet him there.
